# weather.weather_client.WeatherService { #spotforecast2_safe.weather.weather_client.WeatherService }

```python
weather.weather_client.WeatherService(
    latitude,
    longitude,
    cache_path=None,
    use_forecast=True,
)
```

High-level service for weather data generation.

Extends WeatherClient with caching, hybrid fetching (archive+forecast),
and fallback strategies.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name         | Type                                                    | Description                                                   | Default    |
|--------------|---------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| latitude     | [float](`float`)                                        | Latitude of the location.                                     | _required_ |
| longitude    | [float](`float`)                                        | Longitude of the location.                                    | _required_ |
| cache_path   | [Optional](`typing.Optional`)\[[Path](`pathlib.Path`)\] | Optional path to cache file for storing fetched data.         | `None`     |
| use_forecast | [bool](`bool`)                                          | Whether to use forecast data for future dates (default True). | `True`     |

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [get_dataframe](#spotforecast2_safe.weather.weather_client.WeatherService.get_dataframe) | Get weather DataFrame for a specified range using best available methods. |

### get_dataframe { #spotforecast2_safe.weather.weather_client.WeatherService.get_dataframe }

```python
weather.weather_client.WeatherService.get_dataframe(
    start,
    end,
    timezone='UTC',
    freq='h',
    fallback_on_failure=True,
)
```

Get weather DataFrame for a specified range using best available methods.
Refactored from spotpredict.create_weather_df.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name                | Type                                                                                    | Description                                             | Default    |
|---------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| start               | [Union](`typing.Union`)\[[str](`str`), [pd](`pandas`).[Timestamp](`pandas.Timestamp`)\] | Start date for the data.                                | _required_ |
| end                 | [Union](`typing.Union`)\[[str](`str`), [pd](`pandas`).[Timestamp](`pandas.Timestamp`)\] | End date for the data.                                  | _required_ |
| timezone            | [str](`str`)                                                                            | Timezone for the data (default "UTC").                  | `'UTC'`    |
| freq                | [str](`str`)                                                                            | Frequency for the data (default "h").                   | `'h'`      |
| fallback_on_failure | [bool](`bool`)                                                                          | Whether to use fallback data on failure (default True). | `True`     |
